description: QAHub golden set for steel-manufacturing QA accuracy checks. Synthetic but domain-shaped; replace/add real approved ADO examples as they become available.

items.title: Flag out-of-spec A572 Grade 50 tensile result and route for QA disposition
items.description: As a lab tech, I need the MTR review screen to flag a coil sample when yield strength is below the grade requirement so that the heat can be held for metallurgical disposition.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a coil sample for ASTM A572 Grade 50 with yield 49.2 ksi, tensile 67 ksi, elongation 20%, when the result is saved, then the system flags the yield failure.
The user sees the heat number, coil id, sample id, and MTR id in the disposition message.
The system must not mark the MTR as releasable until QA disposition is recorded.

items.title: Validate ABS DH36 Charpy energy and temperature units
items.description: The QA system must evaluate ABS DH36 Charpy results that may arrive in joules/Celsius or ft-lb/Fahrenheit and show the normalized pass/fail result.
acceptanceCriteria: Given ABS DH36 with Charpy 28 J at -20 C, then the feature fails energy below the 34 J minimum.
Given ABS DH36 with Charpy 37 J at -20 C, then the feature passes Charpy energy and temperature.
The UI must show the original units and normalized units.

items.title: Prevent A992 shape certification when yield exceeds maximum
items.description: A992 shape certification currently checks only minimum yield. It must also enforce the maximum yield requirement before generating the MTR.
acceptanceCriteria: Given ASTM A992 with yield 68 ksi, tensile 76 ksi, elongation 20%, then the system fails the result because yield exceeds the maximum.
The generated test cases include a regression case for existing minimum-yield pass behavior.
The MTR export button remains disabled when the spec evaluator returns failedProperties.
